products.name: XP Sliding Gate
products.description: Sliding aluminium gate system compatible with QSHS, XPL, VS and BAYG fence systems. Steel or aluminium track, 80mm wheels, guide rollers, and optional NiceHome FILO automation.

product_components.name: QSG Sliding Gate Top Rail 65mm 6100mm
product_components.description: 6100mm top rail for 65mm horizontal slat sliding gate. Colour-coded powder coat.

product_components.name: QSG Sliding Gate Top Rail 90mm 6100mm
product_components.description: 6100mm top rail for 90mm horizontal slat sliding gate. Colour-coded powder coat.

product_components.name: QSG Sliding Gate Bottom Rail 6100mm
product_components.description: 6100mm bottom rail for sliding gate. Houses gate wheels. Colour-coded powder coat.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate Galvanised Steel Post 65×65mm 2700mm Black
product_components.description: 65×65mm galvanised steel post 2700mm. 2.5mm wall. Welded 8mm base plate with 2× Ø12.8mm fixing holes. For guide roller or front catch. Black press-in cap incl.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate Bottom Rail Extension Kit 400mm
product_components.description: 400mm bottom rail extension kit. Optional — for extra motor rack length. Fixing bolts and terrain powder coat end plate included.

product_components.name: Alumawood Sliding Gate Bottom Rail Extension Kit 400mm
product_components.description: 400mm bottom rail extension kit for Alumawood sliding gate. Terrain powder coat end plate. For motor rack extra length.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate Steel Track 3000mm
product_components.description: 3000mm galvanised steel bolt-down track. 3mm thick. Ø20mm running surface. 22 pre-drilled fixing holes.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate Steel Track 6000mm
product_components.description: 6000mm galvanised steel bolt-down track. 3mm thick. Ø20mm running surface. 42 pre-drilled fixing holes.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate Aluminium Track 6000mm
product_components.description: 6000mm mill finish aluminium 6063-T5 bolt-down track. Ø20mm running surface. No pre-drilled holes — drill as needed.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate Track Anchor Pins
product_components.description: Mushroom-head galvanised steel track anchor pins. 6.5×38mm. Pre-expanded expansion anchor — kinked shaft provides spring action for vibration-proof anchoring into concrete.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate Wheel
product_components.description: 80mm diameter zinc plated steel gate wheel with 20mm diameter groove. 180kg load rating. Made in Italy.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate Wheel Clamping Set
product_components.description: Aluminium M8 threaded block + 2× zinc plated screws. Clamps gate wheel to bottom rail. Suits 1× wheel.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate Self-Adjusting Slide Guide
product_components.description: Self-adjusting slide guide for gate top rail. Keeps gate vertical while travelling. Up to 280mm vertical auto-adjustment. Anodised black channel with nylon block.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate Top Guide Rollers — 2 Pack
product_components.description: White nylon rollers guide top rail while gate travels. For gates with ≤15mm vertical deviation. Left + right zinc plated steel brackets. Made in Italy. 2-pack.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate U-Catch
product_components.description: Steel zinc plated U-catch. Suits up to 50mm gate frames. 5 pre-drilled holes. Rubber stop for noise reduction.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate F-Catch
product_components.description: Steel zinc plated F-catch. F-leg attaches to wall/post. U-catch attaches to F-section. Horizontally adjustable. Rubber stop included.

product_components.name: Sliding Gate Stop
product_components.description: Forged steel zinc plated gate stop with nylon bumper. Bolts to concrete at end of gate track. 4× Ø11mm fixing holes. Made in Italy.

product_components.name: NiceHome Filo 400 Pro Gate Motor Kit
product_components.description: Sliding gate motor kit. Gates up to 6000mm wide, up to 400kg. Includes motor, 2× remotes, photocells. Standard 10A 3-pin plug. Pinion included.

product_components.name: NiceHome Filo 400 Pro Kit — Split Pack
product_components.description: Filo 400 Pro with separate external 24V transformer. Run low-voltage cable up to 50m from transformer to motor. Ideal where 240V mains is hard to route.

product_components.name: NiceHome Filo Gate Motor Remote Control
product_components.description: Extra 5-channel remote for NiceHome gate motor. Supplements the 2 remotes in the FILO-400 kit.

product_components.name: NiceHome Filo Wireless Keypad
product_components.description: PIN number wireless keypad for gate motor. Easy wall/post mount. 2× CR2430 lithium batteries.

product_components.name: NiceHome Filo Solar Power Kit
product_components.description: Solar power system for NiceHome gate motors. Photovoltaic panel + electric battery. No mains power required. Operates day and night.

product_components.name: NiceHome Filo Backup Battery
product_components.description: Optional backup battery for NiceHome gate motor. Provides multiple gate cycles during mains power failure. Rechargeable.

product_components.name: NiceHome Filo Motor Rack (1m)
product_components.description: Tough nylon rack with steel core. 1m sections, 6 fixing points. Affixed to gate bottom rail. Quieter than steel racks. Made in Italy.

rule_sets.name: XPSG Sliding Gate Rules v1
rule_sets.description: Components-only catalogue. No auto-calculation rules yet — sliding gate BOM is quoted manually.

rule_versions.notes: Initial component catalogue. Calculation rules TBD.

product_variables.name: gate_opening_width_mm
product_variables.label: Gate Opening Width (mm)
product_variables.notes: Width of the sliding gate opening in mm. Maximum recommended: 6000mm.

product_variables.name: colour_code
product_variables.label: Colour
product_variables.notes: Powder coat colour. Primrose and Paperbark not available for sliding gate components.

product_variables.name: track_type
product_variables.label: Track Type
product_variables.notes: steel_3m = XPSG-3000-TRACK-ST, steel_6m = XPSG-6000-TRACK-ST, aluminium_6m = XPSG-6000-TRACK-AL.

product_variables.name: automation
product_variables.label: Gate Automation
product_variables.notes: none = manual gate. filo_400 = XPSG-FILO-400. filo_400_sp = XPSG-FILO-400PRO-SP.
